Serilog._comment: Sprint 8: read by Program.cs's .ReadFrom.Configuration() — lets log verbosity be tuned per-environment (e.g. appsettings.Development.json) without a code change. The console sink itself (structured JSON) is configured in code, not here.

Meta._comment: Sprint 8 security hardening: the single App Secret for this platform's shared Meta App (found in the Meta App Dashboard under Settings > Basic). Used to verify X-Hub-Signature-256 on both WhatsApp and Messenger webhooks. MUST be set to a real value in production — see docs/security-audit.md.

Groq._comment: Chat completions — free at https://console.groq.com. Set the real key in appsettings.Development.json (gitignored), never here.

Cohere._comment: Embeddings (RAG) — free tier at https://dashboard.cohere.com/api-keys. Set the real key in appsettings.Development.json (gitignored), never here.

Brevo._comment: Transactional email + ticket notifications — free tier at https://app.brevo.com. Set the real key in appsettings.Development.json (gitignored), never here. Needed regardless of which Email inbound mode a company picks (Webhook or Imap) — it's also used for internal 'new ticket' notifications to your team.

Email._comment: How often (seconds) ImapPollingService checks Imap-mode Email connections for new mail. 10s floor enforced in code regardless of what's set here.

ContentFreshness._comment: Sprint 4 web crawling: how often (minutes) ContentFreshnessService sweeps due WebPages for changes. 1-minute floor enforced in code regardless of what's set here.

Mpesa._comment: Daraja API — free sandbox registration at https://developer.safaricom.co.ke. Sandbox shortcode 174379 and its matching passkey are Safaricom's own published sandbox test values (safe to use as-is, not secrets) — production values are unique per business and must be set for real payments.
